mpesa.name: M-Pesa Clone
mpesa.description: A mobile money transfer and microfinancing service for African markets
mpesa.prompt: A mobile money platform like M-Pesa with secure transactions, agent network management, and financial inclusion features for rural communities in Africa

agritech.name: Agri-Tech Platform
agritech.description: Farm management system for small-scale African farmers
agritech.prompt: An agricultural management platform for small-scale African farmers with weather forecasting, crop disease detection using AI, and marketplace for selling produce directly to buyers

solar.name: Solar Pay-as-you-go
solar.description: Solar energy payment and management system
solar.prompt: A pay-as-you-go solar energy management system for off-grid communities in Africa with mobile payments, usage tracking, and maintenance alerts

health.name: Health Passport
health.description: Digital health records for underserved communities
health.prompt: A digital health passport app for underserved African communities that works offline, stores vaccination records, and connects patients with local healthcare providers

artisan.name: African Artisan Marketplace
artisan.prompt: An e-commerce platform connecting African artisans directly with global buyers, featuring secure payments, logistics management, and cultural storytelling for each product

edtech.name: EdTech for Low Bandwidth
edtech.description: Educational platform optimized for low connectivity
edtech.prompt: An educational platform designed for low-bandwidth African regions with offline content caching, SMS-based learning modules, and localized curriculum in multiple African languages

onboarding.welcome: Hi! 👋 Let's create your project together, step by step. First question: **describe your idea in a few sentences.** What do you want to build, and what problem does it solve?
onboarding.resume: Welcome back! 👋 Let's pick up your project creation exactly where you left off.

questions.description: Describe your idea in a few sentences: what do you want to build, and what problem does it solve?
questions.name: Great! What **name** do you want to give your project?
questions.type: Perfect. What **type of project** is it?
questions.scope: What **geographic scope** are you aiming for?
questions.teamSize: How many people are on your **team**?
questions.recap: Here is your project summary. Review the information, accept the policies, then confirm the creation. ✨

onboarding.confirmHint: Use the card above to confirm the project creation, or click "Start over".
onboarding.success: 🎉 Your project **{{name}}** has been created! You can now generate your deliverables, ask me questions, or track your progress — everything happens here.

errors.descriptionTooShort: Could you tell me a bit more? A few sentences are enough to get started.
errors.nameRequired: I need a name for your project. Which one do you choose?
errors.createFailed: Project creation failed. Check your connection and confirm again.
errors.planFailed: I couldn't prepare my questions, but we can go straight to the summary.

onboarding.aiWelcome: Perfect, {{name}}! 🚀 I've got your idea. Let me ask a few questions to shape your project.
onboarding.composerPlaceholder: Type your answer, or pick a suggestion…

branding.invite: Now let's work on your **brand identity** (logo, colors, typography). Do you want to generate it with AI, or import your own logo?
branding.importRedirect: Alright — the logo import opens in the editor. You can come back to Chat mode afterwards.
branding.laterOk: No problem, we can come back to it anytime. Just say "complete my brand identity".
branding.generatingPalettes: I'm preparing **color and typography** proposals tailored to your project… ⏳
branding.choosePalette: Here are my palette proposals. Which one feels most like you?
branding.chooseLogoType: Perfect. What **logo style** do you have in mind?
branding.describeLogo: Describe the logo you imagine in a few words — shapes, mood, symbols… (optional)
branding.generatingLogos: I'm generating your **logo concepts**… This can take a minute. ⏳
branding.chooseLogo: Here are your logo concepts. Which one do you choose?
branding.complete: 🎉 Your **brand identity is complete**! Logo, variations, colors and typography are saved. Next step: generate your brand guidelines.
branding.alreadyComplete: Your brand identity is already complete. Here it is:

cards.typographySubtitle: Click to choose your font pairing
cards.typographySample: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

errors.save: Could not save your choice. Please try again.

branding.generatingVariations: Great pick! Now generating your **logo variations** (light background, dark background, monochrome)… ⏳
branding.zipUnavailable: The logo pack is not available yet.
branding.charteExists: Your **brand guidelines** have already been generated. ✨ What would you like to do with them?

format.title: Brand guidelines format
format.subtitle: Click to choose the document format
format.question: In which **format** do you want your brand guidelines?
format.cancelledOk: No problem, cancelled. Tell me whenever you want to generate your guidelines.

bp.intro: Great, let's write your **business plan**! For a more complete result, I can include your contact and team information. How would you like to provide it?
bp.formIntro: Fill in this mini-form — only the fields you complete will be used:
bp.freeTextPrompt: Write your information freely (team, roles, contact…) and I will structure it. For example: *"We are two: Alice (CEO) and Bob (CTO). Contact: hello@start.up, +237 6 12 34 56 78, Douala, Cameroon."*
bp.parseFailed: I could not structure that information. Try the form instead, or generate without it.

infoForm.subtitle: Contact and team for the business plan
infoForm.submittedAs: I filled in the information form
